E07-H29.detail: max |dSMD|=0.0003 <= 0.01; SMD provably blind to reorder

E07-H28.detail: needs >=10 real agentic conversion pairs (none exist); synthetic gap above demonstrates the precondition in principle

E07-H38-gate.detail: byte-identical T entropy 0.00 (sharp) vs cross-summary median 0.12; T stays usably concentrated in the realistic regime

E07-H38.detail: tau footrule rises to 0.94 at full reorder vs naive 0.94; separates and recovers position on sharp T

E07-H39.detail: rank normalizers monotone by construction (Spearman~1.0); off-diagonal mass saturates fast as flagged; all in [0,1]; final normalizer choice deferred to a 2nd-article fixture

E07-H40.detail: diff-content structure reads 0.28 gated (ungated 0.29, SMD=0.42 carries the content) vs reorder 0.38 - the axis already separates content from structure; tier cells differ in arrangement too (caveat)

E07-H41.detail: per-statement induced position accounts for the structure number; movers are nameable

E07-H43.detail: reorder cell sits at high semantic (1.00) / low structure (0.43) closeness - a structure-only failure a single blend hides

E07-H30.detail: positional penalty monotone (Spearman 1.00, 0 inversions), SMD uncorrupted (max |dSMD| 0.0003)

E07-H31.detail: SMD plan already near-diagonal on aligned pairs (1.00) and off-diagonal on reorder (0.46); OPW regularizer would add little on aligned pairs as predicted - full OPW solver deferred

E07-H34.detail: GW~0.0000 on reorder vs 0.0249 on cross-summary - GW is a relational, not order, instrument as the design states

E07-H35.detail: FGW stays -0.0000..0.0002 across alpha on a reorder (=SMD), adds nothing; only the cross-summary pair varies with alpha

E07-H32.detail: cross-block mass 0 at no-swap, rises to 0.244 at k=3; bounded [0,1] on paragraph-unit summaries

E07-H42.detail: the cross-block mass IS the bounded [0,1] section variant; >=0 same-block, rises on swap

E07-H33.detail: hierarchical two-level HOTT transport not implemented this batch

E07-H36.detail: Pearson rho=0.66 (95% CI [0.54,0.76]) - CI half-width exceeds the 0.3 margin, not confirmable on one article

E07-H37.detail: tau-structure triangle-inequality violation rate 8% (it is a derived disorder, not claimed a metric - only GW/FGW are); cost tau 0.32ms vs SMD 0.08ms vs GW 0.30ms per pair
